inputs.label: Total Energy Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Annual electrical energy used by the facility (ISO 50001).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual electrical energy used by the facility (ISO 50001).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesis tarafından kullanılan yıllık elektrik enerjisi (ISO 50001).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie électrique annuelle utilisée par l'installation (ISO 50001).
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía eléctrica anual utilizada por la instalación (ISO 50001).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطاقة الكهربائية السنوية المستخدمة من قبل المنشأة (ISO 50001).

inputs.label: Primary Energy Source
inputs.businessContext: The dominant source of electricity (grid mix, solar, wind, natural gas).

businessContext_i18n.en: The dominant source of electricity (grid mix, solar, wind, natural gas).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elektriğin baskın kaynağı (şebeke karışımı, güneş, rüzgar, doğal gaz).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die dominierende Stromquelle (Netz-Mix, Solar, Wind, Erdgas).
businessContext_i18n.fr: La source dominante d'électricité (mix réseau, solaire, éolien, gaz naturel).
businessContext_i18n.es: La fuente dominante de electricidad (mix de red, solar, eólica, gas natural).
businessContext_i18n.ar: المصدر السائد للكهرباء (مزيج الشبكة، الطاقة الشمسية، الرياح، الغاز الطبيعي).

inputs.label: Fossil Fuel Consumption (Fleet & Heating)
inputs.businessContext: Total diesel, gasoline, or heating oil used annually (Scope 1 emissions).

label_i18n.es: Consumo de combustibles fósiles (flota y calefacción)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total diesel, gasoline, or heating oil used annually (Scope 1 emissions).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık toplam dizel, benzin veya ısıtma yağı kullanımı (Kapsam 1 emisyonları).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter jährlicher Verbrauch von Diesel, Benzin oder Heizöl (Scope-1-Emissionen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total de diesel, essence ou fioul de chauffage utilisé annuellement (émissions Scope 1).
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de diésel, gasolina o gasóleo de calefacción utilizado anualmente (emisiones Alcance 1).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الديزل أو البنزين أو زيت التدفئة المستخدم سنويًا (انبعاثات النطاق 1).

inputs.label: Total Waste Generated
inputs.businessContext: Annual waste sent to landfill or incineration (WERC guidelines).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual waste sent to landfill or incineration (WERC guidelines).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık depolama sahasına veya yakma tesisine gönderilen atık (WERC yönergeleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Abfall, der auf Deponien oder in Verbrennungsanlagen landet (WERC-Richtlinien).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Déchets annuels envoyés en décharge ou incinération (directives WERC).
businessContext_i18n.es: Residuos anuales enviados a vertedero o incineración (directrices WERC).
businessContext_i18n.ar: النفايات السنوية المرسلة إلى المكب أو الحرق (إرشادات WERC).

inputs.label: Recycling Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of waste that is recycled or composted (Lean green metrics).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of waste that is recycled or composted (Lean green metrics).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geri dönüştürülen veya kompostlanan atık yüzdesi (Yalın yeşil metrikler).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Abfalls, der recycelt oder kompostiert wird (Lean-Green-Kennzahlen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de déchets recyclés ou compostés (métriques Lean vertes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de residuos que se reciclan o compostan (métricas Lean verdes).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة النفايات التي يتم إعادة تدويرها أو تحويلها إلى سماد (مقاييس اللين الخضراء).

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced per year (for intensity-based benchmarking).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total units produced per year (for intensity-based benchmarking).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yılda üretilen toplam birim (yoğunluk bazlı kıyaslama için).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte produzierte Einheiten pro Jahr (für intensitätsbasierte Benchmarks).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total d'unités produites par an (pour le benchmarking basé sur l'intensité).
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidades totales producidas por año (para evaluación comparativa basada en intensidad).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الوحدات المنتجة سنويًا (لقياس الأداء القائم على الكثافة).

inputs.label: Average Transport Distance per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average distance raw materials or finished goods travel (logistics carbon).

label_i18n.fr: Distance moyenne de transport par unité
label_i18n.es: Distancia media de transporte por unidad

businessContext_i18n.en: Average distance raw materials or finished goods travel (logistics carbon).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hammaddelerin veya bitmiş ürünlerin kat ettiği ortalama mesafe (lojistik karbonu).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Distanz, die Rohstoffe oder Fertigwaren zurücklegen (Logistik-CO₂).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance moyenne parcourue par les matières premières ou les produits finis (carbone logistique).
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia media que recorren las materias primas o productos terminados (carbono logístico).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط المسافة التي تقطعها المواد الخام أو المنتجات النهائية (الكربون اللوجستي).

inputs.label: Active Carbon Offset Program
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if the organization purchases verified carbon credits.

label_i18n.es: Programa activo de compensación de carbono

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if the organization purchases verified carbon credits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kuruluşun doğrulanmış karbon kredisi satın alıp almadığını belirtir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob die Organisation verifizierte CO₂-Zertifikate kauft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indique si l'organisation achète des crédits carbone vérifiés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Indica si la organización compra créditos de carbono verificados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يشير إلى ما إذا كانت المنظمة تشتري أرصدة كربون معتمدة.

rules.message: For grid mix or coal, ensure emission factors are up to date (IPCC guidelines).
Recycling rate must be between 0 and 100 percent.

thresholds.message: Total carbon footprint exceeds 10,000 tCO2e. Immediate reduction strategy required.
Recycling rate below 20% — consider Lean waste reduction initiatives.
Energy intensity per unit > 2.5 kWh — investigate Six Sigma energy waste.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
